{{Quote|I have always suspected I won't be able to retire on health grounds until I've been dead for at least two years, such is the Alliance's need for skilled personnel. Many special operatives are doubtless in the same position. It's not just a job…|Jakob Biddyn, Special Operations Group Leader|<ref name="GG9" />}}
'''Jakob Biddyn''' was a venerable [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] Group Leader during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
